title: OERC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Ombudsman Posts
description: The Odisha Electricity Regulatory Commission (OREC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Ombudsman Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech and MBA can apply for the OERC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection process, appli...
